nasb.text: “Now therefore arise, O Lord God, to Your resting place, You and the ark of Your might; let Your priests, O Lord God, be clothed with salvation and let Your godly ones rejoice in what is good.

esv.text: “And now arise, O Lord God, and go to your resting place, you and the ark of your might. Let your priests, O Lord God, be clothed with salvation, and let your saints rejoice in your goodness.

cnv.text: 現在，耶和華　神啊，求你起來，願你和你有大能的約櫃進入你安息的地方；耶和華　神啊，願你的祭司都披上救恩；願你的聖民在福樂中歡欣。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝啊， 愿你起来与你大能的约柜一同进入你的安息之所！ 耶和华上帝啊， 愿你的祭司披上救恩， 愿你的圣民蒙福欢乐！
